result.reason: The RDP ActiveX control aggressively synchronizes the remote clipboard when 'RedirectClipboard' is enabled, leading to unwanted remote clipboard updates. A smarter synchronization mechanism is needed.
result.approach: Introduce a new boolean setting 'SmartClipboardSynchronization' in ConnectionInfo. In RdpProtocol, manage the '_rdpClient.AdvancedSettings6.RedirectClipboard' property dynamically. This will be controlled by the focus state of the RDP connection tab, ensuring the remote clipboard is only redirected when the RDP session is active and the 'SmartClipboardSynchronization' setting is enabled.
